entry_rationale: STRONGLY FAVORED: This contract resolves on the official NYMEX/ICE-published daily settlement for the WTI front-month on 2026-03-06, and the market is priced at 96% YES (implying a small remaining tail risk). Supporting Evidence: The settlement threshold is a single point (> $73.99), and once the official settlement is published it is not subject to discretionary recounts/appeals; resolution is a mechanical reference-price check against the published settlement. Resolution Source: NYMEX (CME Group) WTI Crude Oil futures official daily settlement publication (and Kalshi’s market rules referencing that official settlement). Risk Checklist: clear resolution source ✓; no formal challenges/appeals path ✓; stable inputs/defined observation time ✓. Risk Level: LOW (selected as the single lowest-risk available candidate after excluding Tier 1 crypto and Tier 2 speaking markets; Tier 3 weather was avoided where possible). Remaining Risks: Intraday oil price volatility before the settlement print could still move settlement below $74.00. Sources: https://www.cmegroup.com/markets/energy/crude-oil/light-sweet-crude.html

Outcome Status -- STRONGLY FAVORED: Rotten Tomatoes currently lists Hoppers at 94% on the Tomatometer from 143 critic reviews, which is above the market's >92 threshold. Supporting Evidence -- With a 143-review base already in place and about 41 hours until market close, the score would need a meaningful late negative swing to finish at 92 or lower, so the current edge is supported by a substantial sample. Resolution Source -- The resolving authority is the publicly displayed Rotten Tomatoes Tomatometer for Hoppers on the film's official RT page. Risk Checklist -- Passed required items because there are no formal appeals or official review challenges identified and the resolution source is clear; passed optional items because there is a strong current position and recent corroboration within 72 hours from the live RT listing. Risk Level -- LOW, and this market was selected as the single lowest-risk available candidate; Remaining Risks -- a late cluster of additional negative reviews could still move the displayed score down to 92 or below before close; Sources -- https://www.rottentomatoes.com/m/hoppers ; https://editorial.rottentomatoes.com/article/hoppers-first-reviews-john-hamms-latest-comedy-hops-to-it/
